ddt:Target.Name: SCU_eShiftAct_C1AHS_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Author : ARJUN MUTHU K R
Applications: x1310/xCB/xDD/xHN/xJB/xJBph2/XDE
Reference Documents: DID (RENAULT): DID (SUPPLIER): REF17_Diagnostic_ressources_file_Template-S23 DTC: EventList_REF17_Diagnostic_ressources_file_Template-S23 PROTOCOL :Diag ON CAN
-------------------------------------- Comments:
Date: 10/06/2022 SCU_eShiftAct_C1AHS_v1.0 DTC extended data are not coded

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: Absolute position angle given by park position sensor
CAN parameter Battery voltage from USM A101

Item.Text: Vds over voltage error Several bits can be set at the same time
CL1, CL2 signal too high Fault detected
CL1, CL2 signal too low Fault detected
MCU Integrity, ROM, RAM, Peripheral test Error Fault detected
EEPROM reading Error Fault detected several bits can be set at the same time

Data.Name: CAN parameter Odometer at last occurrence of DTC from VDC_A114
DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
[P07E9]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range failure (S1 to S8)
[P07EA]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND (S1 to S8)
[P07EB]Shift Position Sensor signal open failure (S1 to S8)
[P0850]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range
[P0851]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND
[P18A8]Shift Position Sensor signal Park/ No Park
[P272A]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to ground or open )
[P272B]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to battery )
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Request.Name: DataRead.Absolute position angle given by park position sensor

DataItem.Name: Absolute position angle given by park position sensor

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN parameter Battery voltage from USM A101

DataItem.Name: CAN parameter Battery voltage from USM A101

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN parameter Odometer at last occurrence of DTC from VDC_A114

DataItem.Name: CAN parameter Odometer at last occurrence of DTC from VDC_A114

Device.Name: BCM
Device.Mnemonic: Invalid value on frame from BCM

Device.Name: USM
Device.Mnemonic: Invalid value on frame from USM

Device.Name: HEVC
Device.Mnemonic: Invalid value on frame from HEVC

Device.Name: VDC
Device.Mnemonic: Invalid value on frame from VDC

Device.Name: Missing communication with HFM
Device.Mnemonic: DTC MUX: Missing communication with HFM

Device.Name: Missing communication with VDC
Device.Mnemonic: DTC MUX: Missing communication with VDC

Device.Name: Missing communication with BCM
Device.Mnemonic: DTC MUX: Missing communication with BCM

Device.Name: Missing communication with USM
Device.Mnemonic: DTC MUX: Missing communication with USM

Device.Name: Missing communication with HEVC
Device.Mnemonic: DTC MUX: Missing communication with HEVC
